text: Wow!  I thought this SMA was impressive the first time I saw it, but when you compare it against the actual movie like this it shows how incredible it really is.  The attention to detail is amazing - Neo's cape, the agent's dodging, the characters' positions relative to the background...everything is just about as close to the original as you could possibly come with Legos.  Great job!

text:
@Lempikah:
Don't be silly, if he shot at his leg he would've just moved his leg.  The whole idea is that he knows where the bullets are going and dodges based on that.  He only moves his torso because Neo's only shooting towards his torso, so there's no reason for him to move his legs since he knows that no bullets are flying in that direction.  If he were to shoot at his leg the agent would move his leg too.
